title: Lotus Mods
description: This is a create and magic modpack with many QoL additions for a fun SMP experience
body:
This modpack is about building, exploration, and automation. The core is the Create mod, which lets you build everything from massive factories to functional trains with Steam 'n' Rails. If you’d rather use magic than machinery, you can master the elements with Ars Nouveau or cast powerful rituals using Occultism.

The world you’ll be playing in is shaped by Continents and Biomes O' Plenty. Traveling these lands is easy and fun whether you're flying or sailing.

You can also cook with Farmer's Delight, craft your backpack to carry your gear while you travel.
